violations.description: Radio button group for 'Priority Level' is not wrapped in a <fieldset> with a <legend>. Screen readers cannot associate the group label with the radio buttons.
violations.reference_fix: Priority Level

violations.description: Radio inputs have no associated <label> elements. The adjacent <span> text is not programmatically linked to the radio buttons.
violations.reference_fix:
<input type="radio" id="priority-low" name="priority" value="low">
<label for="priority-low">Low - Not urgent</label>

violations.description: Checkbox inputs have no associated <label> elements. The adjacent <span> text is not programmatically linked to the checkboxes.

page_description: A support ticket form with text inputs (properly labeled), radio buttons for priority, and checkboxes for contact preference. Radio and checkbox inputs lack proper labels and the radio group has no fieldset/legend.
